ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ASSOCIATES

LAW AND MOTION 302, THIS CASE IS CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NUMBER 523268 (CHIN VS. SF UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT) WHICH IS THE LEAD CASE. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CROSS-COMPLAINANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-DEFENDANT LEONARDO HO'S ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED NO AUTHORITY REQUIRING THAT VERIFIED ANSWER BE MADE TO THE SCHOOL DISTRICT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 446 APPLIES TO PUBLIC AGENCIES AS "PLAINTIFFS." ALTHOUGH THE TERMS "COMPLAINT"AND "CROSS-COMPLAINT" ARE DEFINED AS INTERCHANGEABLE OR INCLUSIVE IN SOME PARTS OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE (E.G., CCP 429.30 AND CCP 438), PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CITED TO AN APPLICABLE REFERENCE FOR SECTION 446. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

This case is consolidated with Case Number 523268 (CHIN VS. SF UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT) which is the lead case. No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CROSS-COMPLAINANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-DEFENDANT LEONARDO HO'S ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Denied. Plaintiff has provided no authority requiring that verified answer be made to the School District's Cross-Complaint. Code of Civil Procedure section 446 applies to public agencies as "plaintiffs." Although the terms "complaint"and "cross-complaint" are defined as interchangeable or inclusive in some parts of the Code of Civil Procedure (e.g., CCP 429.30 and CCP 438), Plaintiff has not cited to an applicable reference for section 446. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Continued To May-15-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
